message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #d9d9d9
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #8fd0f0
  ParticipantBorderColor #4a4a4a
  ParticipantFontColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #9a9a9a
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ActorBorderColor #4a4a4a
  ActorBackgroundColor #8fd0f0
  ArrowColor #4a4a4a
  BoxBorderColor #7a7a7a
  BoxBackgroundColor transparent
  NoteBackgroundColor #b9f2b0
  NoteBorderColor #2f7d2f
}
hide footbox

participant producer
participant consumer
participant broker
participant "NameServer" as NS1
participant "NameServer" as NS2

== NameServer 启动流程 ==
producer -> NS1 : 1 启动 NameServer 服务器
activate NS1
NS1 -> NS2 : 2 启动监听
note right of NS1
监听 broker 链接
监听 producer 链接
监听 consumer 链接
end note
NS1 -> NS1 : 3
NS1 --> producer : 4
deactivate NS1

== broker 启动流程 ==
producer -> broker : 5 启动 broker 服务器
activate broker
broker -> NS1 : 6 每个 broker 与 每个 NameServer 建立长链接
activate NS1
NS1 --> broker : 7
deactivate NS1
broker --> producer : 8
broker --> NS1 : 9 每 30 秒发送心跳
deactivate broker

== producer 启动/发消息流程 ==
producer -> producer : 10 启动
activate producer
producer -> NS1 : 11 先与一台 NameServer 建立长链接
activate NS1
NS1 --> producer : 12
deactivate NS1
producer -> NS1 : 13 获取路由信息，获取 topic 与 broker queue 的对应关系
activate NS1
NS1 --> producer : 14
deactivate NS1
producer --> producer : 15
producer --> NS2 : 16 每 30 秒更新一次路由信息
producer -> producer : 17 发送消息
producer -> broker : 18 随机选择一个 queue，并发送消息
activate broker
broker --> producer : 19
deactivate broker
producer --> producer : 20
deactivate producer

== consumer 启动/pull消息流程 ==
consumer -> consumer : 21 启动
activate consumer
consumer -> NS2 : 22 与一台 NameServer 建立长链接
activate NS2
NS2 --> consumer : 23
deactivate NS2
consumer -> NS2 : 24 获取 topic 的路由信息
activate NS2
NS2 --> consumer : 25
deactivate NS2
consumer -> broker : 26 建立长链接并获取 queue
activate broker
broker --> consumer : 27
deactivate broker
consumer --> consumer : 28
consumer --> broker : 29 每 30 秒发送心跳，确保 broker 存活
consumer --> NS2 : 30 每 30 秒更新路由信息
consumer -> consumer : 31 消息消费
consumer -> broker : 32 拉取消息消费
activate broker
broker --> consumer : 33
deactivate broker
consumer --> consumer : 34
deactivate consumer

@enduml
